financial.entity: The Hongkong and Shanghai Banking Corporation (HSBC)
financial.note: Acts as a primary custodian and strategic hedging partner (confirmed 2025-2026 hedging arrangements); rising rates increase cost of corporate credit lines and hedging premiums.
BBL manages local working capital and payroll; high interest rates increase financing costs for massive CAPEX in India and Thailand (e.g., Krishnagiri Plant).
Holds ~1.14% equity; state-linked fund support provides liquidity floor and reflects sovereign investment sentiment.

supply_chain.note: Critical collaboration on AI data centers and 800 VDC architectures for 'AI Factories' (GTC 2026 synergy); DELTA's power solutions are essential for NVIDIA hardware.
Strategic partner for Southeast Asian EV charging infrastructure; volume directly correlates with regional EV adoption rates.
Dependency on active semiconductor materials; supply shortages or price hikes at the foundry level create significant production lags and margin pressure.
2026 MoU partner for domestic clean energy and energy-efficient solution distribution in Thailand.

competitors.note: Direct global rival in power modules and electronic components; competitive pricing affects DELTA's market positioning.
Rivalry in high-efficiency power supplies and automotive electronics; sector rotation often sees capital moving between TDK and DELTA.
Though a competitor in global tenders, royalty payments and group synergy (transfer of business units in 2026) create a positive correlation.

macro_commodity_factors.logic: Copper hit record highs (USD 14,500/tonne) in Q1 2026; major input for wiring and power components, causing direct margin compression.
Export-heavy model (~90% revenue in USD); THB depreciation significantly boosts top-line translation and competitiveness in the AI sector.
Renewed 2026 tariffs on EV components and power electronics manufactured in certain Asian nodes (Thailand/India) act as a trade cost drag.
Correlates with the Power Electronics Group (~71% of revenue); hyperscale spending on AI infrastructure is the primary revenue engine for 2026.
